provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Exchange Control Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: any notes of a class which are or have at any time been legal tender in any country and any document or instrument intended to enable the person to whom it is issued to obtain currency as defined herein and includes a right to currency in respect of any credit or balance at a bank or with any other person
